HMX Series \u2014 High Mileage Synthetic.description: Formulated for vehicles with 75,000+ miles. Minimizes wear, restores lost engine performance, revitalizes hardened seals, reduces oil consumption, and removes engine deposits. Synerlec technology provides exceptional film strength increase and ionic attraction to metal components. Outstanding LSPI protection and unmatched cold-start wear protection.
HMX Series \u2014 High Mileage Synthetic.application: High-mileage engines (75K+ miles), older vehicles, engines with oil consumption

skus.notes: Royal Purple High Mileage Synthetic variant
Royal Purple High Mileage Synthetic variant

Duralec Series \u2014 Diesel Synthetic.description: Premium diesel motor oils with Synerlec technology. Duralec Super (CK-4) provides high performance for diesel engines requiring emissions-compliant oil — excellent high-temperature breakdown resistance and low-temperature pumpability. Duralec Ultra delivers unsurpassed film strength and lubricity (up to 4X more than top competitors) for rigorous on/off highway applications.
Duralec Series \u2014 Diesel Synthetic.application: Diesel trucks, fleet vehicles, over-the-road trucking, agriculture, construction, emissions-controlled engines with DPF/EGR/SCR

skus.notes: Light-duty diesel — Cummins, Duramax, Power Stroke
Heavy-duty diesel, fleet and commercial applications

RP Synthetic \u2014 Standard Full Synthe.description: Core Royal Purple synthetic line. Same Synerlec® technology as RS Series, positioned as the standard full synthetic offer across common viscosity grades.
RP Synthetic \u2014 Standard Full Synthe.application: General full synthetic upsell, vehicles not requiring specialty RS or HMX formulations

Royal Purple Additives.description: Royal Purple performance additives and specialty products. Max-Clean deeply cleans fuel systems. Max-Atomizer optimizes fuel injector spray patterns. Max-Restore high mileage engine treatment. Max-Tane diesel fuel treatment. Max-Boost octane booster. Purple Ice coolant additive. Max ATF synthetic transmission fluid. Max Gear synthetic gear oil. Synchromax manual trans fluid. Ultra-Performance Grease. Plus specialty lubricants: Max EZ, Max-Chain, and MaxFilm.
Royal Purple Additives.application: Fuel system maintenance, transmission service, differential service, chassis lubrication

skus.notes: Fuel injector cleaner — optimizes spray patterns
Diesel fuel treatment — boosts cetane rating
Legacy catch-all RP code — no specific viscosity/formulation
Max ATF Full Synthetic Transmission Fluid

HP API Series \u2014 High Performance Sy.description: Royal Purple's flagship full synthetic with API SP/ILSAC GF-6A licenses and GM dexos1 approval. Combines premium synthetic base oils with proprietary Synerlec additive technology. Optimized fuel economy, enhanced engine performance, and long-term protection. 5X increased protection against LSPI, superior corrosion protection, 50% improved deposit control.
HP API Series \u2014 High Performance Sy.application: Modern GDI/turbo engines, start/stop systems, daily drivers, import vehicles, performance cars

skus.notes: Honda, Toyota, Mazda — most common modern spec
Most common viscosity across all platforms

HPS Series \u2014 High Performance Stree.description: Specifically formulated to maximize performance in high performance, modified, and street-driven vehicles. High level of zinc/phosphorus anti-wear additive with a generous dose of Synerlec. Outstanding wear protection, increased power, exceptional oxidation stability, superior high-temperature performance, and greater engine cleanliness.
HPS Series \u2014 High Performance Stree.application: Modified engines, street performance, enthusiast builds, classic cars, muscle cars, out-of-warranty vehicles

XPR Series \u2014 Extreme Performance Ra.description: Formulated for the rigorous demands and severe operating conditions of racing and extreme performance engine applications. State-of-the-art formulation and additive chemistry fortified with high level of zinc/phosphorus anti-wear additive and Synerlec. Unsurpassed wear protection, outstanding oxidation resistance, increased efficiency, outstanding deposit control, and improved compatibility with exotic fuels.
XPR Series \u2014 Extreme Performance Ra.application: Professional racing, drag racing, circle track, road racing, extreme performance engine builds

Max-Cycle \u2014 Motorcycle Oil.description: Exceeds the demands of highly stressed motorcycle engines and transmissions. Recommended for air-cooled and liquid-cooled 4-cycle engines. Compatible with wet-clutch transmissions. Improved film strength, shear stability, and oxidation resistance. Outstanding wet clutch performance, superior high-temperature protection, and lower cylinder temperatures.
Max-Cycle \u2014 Motorcycle Oil.application: Motorcycles — air-cooled and liquid-cooled 4-cycle, wet-clutch compatible, sport bikes, cruisers, touring

Break-In Oil.description: Conventional SAE 10W-30 engine oil providing outstanding wear protection during the critical break-in period for new and rebuilt engines. Protects engine valve train and camshaft while allowing piston rings to quickly seat. Optimized wear protection during the break-in phase.
Break-In Oil.application: New engine builds, rebuilt engines, re-ringed engines — break-in period only

skus.notes: Engine break-in oil — not for sustained use

HP 2-C \u2014 Two-Cycle Oil.description: High performance synthetic 2-cycle oil for standard and high performance gasoline engines. Recommended for pre-mixed and oil-injected applications. Ashless formulation keeps spark plugs and exhaust ports clean. Increased horsepower and engine speed, greatest wear protection, superior rust and corrosion protection.
HP 2-C \u2014 Two-Cycle Oil.application: 2-cycle gasoline engines — chainsaws, weed trimmers, dirt bikes, jet skis, outboard motors

Snow 2-C \u2014 Snowmobile Oil.description: High performance synthetic 2-cycle oil for snowmobile gasoline engines. Synthetic solvency keeps spark plugs and exhaust ports clean. Low coefficient of friction promotes increased horsepower and engine speed. Low temperature fluidity and pumpability for superior cold temperature operation.

competitor_brands.conversion_note: S-prefix = Full Synthetic → easiest RP convert (RS same tier). Bare viscosity codes = conventional → upsell opportunity.
VS → RS direct swap. VM (MaxLife) → HMX direct swap. VB/VE conventional → upsell to RS or HMX.
Mobil 1 buyers are already premium synthetic customers — brand loyalty is stronger but RP performance story closes the gap.
CS prefix = Castrol Edge. Same tier as RS — direct competitive swap.
PS/PU = premium syn → RS direct. PB conventional → full upsell opportunity.

service_tiers.name: Basic Check
service_tiers.description: Quick check service — no oil product

spec_flags.name: ILSAC GF-6
spec_flags.description: Latest ILSAC standard — fuel economy + protection

spec_flags.name: GM Dexos 1
spec_flags.description: GM factory-fill specification for most GM gas engines

conversion_segments.codes: S*, VS*, M*, CS*, PS*, PU*
conversion_segments.rationale: Already paying premium synthetic prices. RP performance story is the only lift needed.
Already in the high-mileage segment at a comparable price tier. Direct lateral move.
Price jump required. Needs an upsell conversation about long-term engine protection value.
conversion_segments.suggested_sku: RS or HMX depending on mileage

conversion_segments.codes: Ancillary only, or spec flags only
conversion_segments.rationale: Invoice contained no classifiable oil product code. May be a filter-only visit or data gap.
